candidates.why: The COGS reference bucket is the selected row 'Cost of goods sold'. In the visible years, 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold' plus this depreciation row equals the selected 'Cost of goods sold' amount (for example 4677.17 + 140.35 = 4817.52), indicating this D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS row and is a component, not a separate same-level add-on.
This label belongs to selling expenses, not COGS, and shows no visible values in the excerpt. It is not relevant to the selected COGS bucket.
This label belongs to administrative expenses, not COGS, and shows no visible values in the excerpt. It is not relevant to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Do not add COGS D&A separately because the explicit depreciation line appears to be a component already included in the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row.

candidates.why: There are separate depreciation lines immediately around the selected SG&A buckets. For selling, 'Selling expenses.' plus the depreciation row equals 'Selling expenses' (414.93 + 38.65 = 453.58). For admin, the lower 'Administrative expenses' plus the depreciation row equals the upper selected 'Administrative expenses' (390.53 + 20.34 = 410.87). This indicates the depreciation rows are sub-components already embedded in the selected SG&A parent rows, so they should not be added separately.

This appears to be a placeholder/duplicate-style label for selling D&A, but it has no visible values. The actual populated selling depreciation is already embedded in the selected parent row 'Selling expenses', so nothing should be added separately.

This appears to be a placeholder/duplicate-style label for administrative D&A, but it has no visible values. The actual populated administrative depreciation is already embedded in the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses', so nothing should be added separately.

variables.notes: Do not add SG&A D&A separately because the visible depreciation rows reconcile as components of the selected selling and administrative expense parent rows. No separate R&D row is present, and XRD is empty.
